barRaise.topFinding: This cycle the canonical-doc cluster is finally being paid down, but in a dirty tree. Uncommitted v0.98.2 work reworks write-dashboard-status.ps1 to source the milestone from .project-context.json (closing the hardcoded-M3 data-integrity finding), bumps the GDD date pill current to 2026-06-11, and adds docs/ASSET_PRODUCTION-2026-06-11.md with a 3D model gap inventory and seven-batch production order. The catch: that progress is uncommitted and the GDD already carries a v0.98.2 pill with no matching release commit - the exact stacking-a-version-bump-in-a-dirty-tree shape that lost the project.godot tail in the 2026-06 truncation incident, and a new reliability flag this cycle. Six mediums remain, all carried 3D-canonicalization debt: CLAUDE.md still primes a 2D AStarGrid2D game (and a stale 64x32 tile size the GDD retired at 32x16), the Roadmap has no 3D milestone, OPTIMIZATION_LOG has no profiled 3D-crowd run, the 3D save has no version field, and the dead 2D render path plus its enemy_pool/projectile_pool autoloads are still in the tree. Engineering reflexes are sound; the gap is commit hygiene and finishing the canonical-surface migration.
